1995March 19, 1995

🇦🇺 Sydney, Australia

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Sydney, Australia, March 19, 1995 -- March 29, 1995

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1995-03-sydney-australia

13 Resolutions

242Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with EPISTLE
SC 4 expresses its desire to establish a Category A liaison with EPISTLE.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
241Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with ISO/TC 211
SC 4 expresses its desire to establish a Category A liaison with ISO/TC 211 on Geographic Information Systems and appoints Barbara Warthen as that liaison to actively manage information flow betwee...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
239Plenary
Request revision to title of ISO/TC 184/SC 4
SC 4 requests its parent committee to revise the title of ISO/TC 184/SC 4 from Industrial Data and Global Manufacturing Programming Languages to Industrial Data.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
238Plenary
Appoint Alistair Watson as project leader for Building Structural Frame
For the new work item Building Structural Frame, SC 4 appoints Alistair Watson project leader and assigns this project to WG 3.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
237Plenary
Appoint Patrice Poyet as project leader for Building Services, Heating, Ventilation and AC
For the new work item Building Services, Heating, Ventilation and AC, SC 4 appoints Patrice Poyet project leader and assigns this project to WG 3.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
236Plenary
Appoint Jeff Wix as project leader for STEP Building Construction Core Model
For the new work item STEP Building Construction Core Model, SC 4 appoints Jeff Wix project leader and assigns this project to WG 3.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
235Plenary
Appoint Julian Fowler as project leader for STEP Development Methods
For the new work item STEP Development Methods, SC 4 appoints Julian Fowler project leader and assigns this project to WG 10. The WG 5 Project 2 is transferred to WG 10 to support this project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
234Plenary
Appoint Howard Mason as project leader for Amendment 1 to 10303-1
For the new work item for Amendment 1 to 10303-1, SC 4 appoints Howard Mason project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
233Plenary
Appoint Bernd Wenzel as deputy convener for Working Group 10
SC 4 appoints Bernd Wenzel as deputy convener for Working Group 10 on architecture.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
232Plenary
Appoint Julian Fowler as convener of Working Group 10
SC 4 appoints Mr. Julian Fowler as the convener of Working Group 10, Technical Architecture.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
231Plenary
Establish a Policy and Planning Committee
SC 4 establishes a Policy and Planning Committee to become the single advisory group to assist the SC 4 Chairman, Committee, Conveners and Project Leaders: * To facilitate the smooth running of the...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 wishes to give its unanimous thanks to John Mitchell, and to the following members of Standards Australia: Brigitte Catteau, David Bruce-Steer, Rhonda Putman, Rosie Sabadina, Betty Titcombe, L...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 members both at the meeting and from various countries on the Internet also wish to thank Dick Wittenoom from AusSTEP Consultants for providing computer support and SC 4's first use of meeting...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
